'''Slag Flats''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. In [[85 BBY/Legends|85 BBY]], she came to Tatooine on the [[Dowager Queen/Legends|colony ship]] that founded [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] after she was exiled from [[Ithor/Legends|Itho]]<nowiki/>r. Over the years, Slag carved a place out for herself in the criminal underworld of Mos Eisley, but not one big enough for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]] to take notice. Her criminal organization operated out of an abandoned [[Tower Ridge Water Silo|water silo]] in the city.

When [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] defected from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] shortly after its creation by faking his death in a staged [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack, he fled to Tatooine and sought help from Slag Flats. Slag assisted Tallon with disappearing and maintained infrequent contact with him over the years. When the Empire discovered Tallon was alive and hiding on Tatooine during their [[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|search]] for the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]], a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head and a large [[Escape from Tatooine|manhunt]] commenced. Slag was fond of the honorable admiral and tried to help him escape Tatooine. She hired a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] named [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Labria]] to look out for a trustworthy and capable group that could help her extract Tallon. When a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]] confronted Labria for information on Tallon's whereabouts, the Devaronian agreed to arrange a meeting with Slag Flats. Before the meeting, Slag messaged [[Arno (Tatooinian)|Old Arno]], the only other [[Oldster|founding colonist]] still alive, and instructed him to link up with the rebels and lead them to Tallon. Unbeknownst to Slag, Labria had been bought out by the bounty hunter [[Jodo Kast]]. After the Devaronian tipped him off about the meeting, Kast and a squad of bounty hunters assassinated Slag Flats and her associates. When the rebels reached Slag's silo hideout, they found the Ithorian with her head splayed and a [[Sennari/Legends|Sennari]]-[[Poison dart/Legends|tipped dart]] in her neck.
